rows.des_text: How many items did {0} win at auction during this ranking period?
What was the most Auction Coins {0} spent on a single order this ranking period?
What was the highest single force type rating on the most expensive Titan Gear {0} won this ranking period?
What gear part was the most expensive Titan Gear {0} won this ranking period?

62909.name: Beginner Titan Gear Random Material Box
62909.desc: Open it to get ONE of the following: Smelt Goldgleam x1, Liquid Alloy x1, Honeycomb Core x1, Gel Layer x1 or Micro Electronics x1.

62910.name: Titan Gear Material Choice Chest
62910.desc: Open the chest and select ONE of the following: Smelt Goldgleam x1, Liquid Alloy x1, Honeycomb Core x2, Gel Layer x2 or Micro Electronics x2.

69559.name: Pro HT Chip Chest
69559.desc: Use it to randomly get an HT Chip of any slot at Legendary rarity.

235102.name: Choco Indulgence
235102.desc:
The ultimate treat: cakes, puddings and pies enhanced with some chocolate.
Placing on site: March Size increase. 1 at Lv. 1, and +1 for each level increased.

820015.name: Mid-tier Catalyst
820015.desc: A general-purpose material, it guarantees the robust basic performance of Titan Gear.

820016.name: Advanced-tier Catalyst
820016.desc: A general-purpose material, it guarantees the robust basic performance of Titan Gear.

820017.name: Top-tier Catalyst
820017.desc: A general-purpose material, it guarantees the robust basic performance of Titan Gear.

1001701.name: Auction Coin
1001701.desc: Auction Coins are required for bidding on items in the Auction House. They will not be removed after the event and can be used in the next event.

1001702.name: Revenue Coin
1001702.desc: Revenue Coins can be earned by successfully selling items in the Auction House. They can be used to exchange for rare items in the store. Revenue Coins will not be removed after the event and can be used in the next event.

1701237.name: Spring Festival Float
1701237.desc:
Enjoy dozens of colorful floats and lively dragons!
Placing on site: All units Damage Increase. 2% at Lv. 1, and +2% for each level.

1701279.name: Hippie Dragon
1701279.desc:
Wishing you a carefree, productive 2023.
Placing on site: Each level grants all units Damage Increase +2%, Decreased Damage Taken +1%.

2321000.name: Lovable & Huggable
2321000.desc:
Sometimes, all it takes to feel better is to be near the one we love.
Placing on site: Decreased Damage Taken of all units. 2.5% at Lv. 1, and +2.5% for each level increased.

2362201.name: Rice Rider
2362201.desc:
Upon the Rice Rider, stories unfold. Warriors brave, with tales left untold.
Placing on site
Increase Attack of all units (on the offensive). 5.0% at Lv. 1, and +5.0% for each level increased.

2800004.name: Full Defense Formation Breakdown
2800004.desc: Full breakdown of All-Defense Formation data. An exclusive item required for advancing the All-Defense Formation.

4161002.name: Serene Moments
4161002.desc:
It conjures up images of a crisp fall day and the sun's warmth.
Placing on site:
All units Attack increases by 2%. 2% at Lv. 1, and +2% for each level increased.
All units HP increases by 2%. 2% at Lv. 1, and +2% for each level increased.

10000059.name: Skill Shard Lucky Chest
10000059.desc: Use it to randomly get 10 - 1,000 exclusive skill shards. Good luck!

10000096.name: Decor Shard Lucky Chest
10000096.desc: Use it to randomly get 10 - 1,000 Universal Decor Shards. Good luck!

23044404.name: Hologram Choice Chest
23044404.desc: Use it to select one of the following Holograms: Eagle Hologram, Shark Hologram or Scorpion Hologram.

23044405.name: Resonator Choice Chest
23044405.desc: Use it to select one of the following Resonators: Eagle Resonator, Shark Resonator or Scorpion Resonator.

44000016.name: Artillery Storm Rune
44000016.desc: Activate or merge to enhance star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Attack Boost for Heroes.

44000017.name: All-Out Surge Rune
44000017.desc: Activate or merge to enhance star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Trigger active skill an additional time.

44000018.name: Tactical Awareness Rune
44000018.desc: Activate or merge to enhance star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Damage Increase boost.

44000019.name: Searing Rune
44000019.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Adding "Ignite" to Hero Active Skills.

44000020.name: Armor-Breaking Rune
44000020.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Adding "Vulnerable" to Hero Active Skills.

44000021.name: Impact Rune
44000021.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Adding "Debilitation" to Hero Active Skills.

44000022.name: Magnetic Field Rune
44000022.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Adding "Magnetic Pulse" to Hero Active Skills.

44000023.name: Steel Torrent Rune
44000023.desc: Activate or merge to enhance star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: HP Boost for Heroes.

44000024.name: Unbreakable Rune
44000024.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Extend "Indestructible" for Heroes by 1 Round.

44000025.name: Stealth Hologram Rune
44000025.desc: Activate or merge to enhance star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Decreased Damage Taken boost.

44000026.name: Flammable Rune
44000026.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Strengthen hero's "Ignite".

44000027.name: Heavy Blow Rune
44000027.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Strengthen hero's "Vulnerable".

44000028.name: Debilitate Rune
44000028.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Strengthen hero's "Debilitation".

44000029.name: Magnetize Rune
44000029.desc: Activate or merge to enhance the star level of the Titan Gear Special Effect: Strengthen hero's "Magnetic Pulse".

47007002.name: Enigma Repeater
47007002.desc: Replicates the patterns of Enigma Spirit Ruins carvings, conducts Enigma power, used for upgrading Enigma Field Slots.

47007009.name: Legendary Beast Chest
47007009.desc: Grants a random Legendary Enigma Beast from the following: Lumideer, Hoveray, Galeagle, or Grizzclaw.

47007010.name: Legendary Beast Chest Shard
47007010.desc: Use 100 shards to craft a Legendary Beast Chest

47007024.name: Legendary Beast Chest II
47007024.desc: Grants a random Legendary Enigma Beast from the following: Bounceroo, Swiftsteed, Dusklion, or Crestegret.

47007025.name: Legendary Beast Chest II Shard
47007025.desc: Use 100 shards to craft a Legendary Beast Chest II

54000012.name: Mischief Master
54000012.desc:
I want to become the next prank master.
Placing on site:
All units Attack increases by 2%. 2% at Lv. 1, and +2% for each level increased.
All units HP increases by 2%. 2% at Lv. 1, and +2% for each level increased.

54000039.name: Bountiful Harvest
54000039.desc:
Quietly watching the fruits grow, joy remains a constant companion.
Placing on site:
March Size +1. March Size +1 at Lv. 1, and +1 for each level.

54000133.name: Eternity Love
54000133.desc:
With you by my side.
Placing on site: Decreased Damage Taken of all units. 2.5% at Lv. 1, and +2.5% for each level increased.

54000136.name: Dragon Lantern Delight
54000136.desc:
Bringing warmth and the taste of home!
Placing on site: All units Damage Increase. 2.5% at Lv. 1, and +2.5% for each level increased.

54000320.name: Chiran Loong
54000320.desc:
A dragon will never be trapped in a shallow pond.
Placing on site:
Decreased Damage Taken of all units. 2.5% at Lv. 1, and +2.5% for each level increased.

54000400.name: Mischief Pumpkin
54000400.desc:
Let's see what other pranks I can come up with!
Placing on site:
All units Attack increase on the offensive. 5% at Lv. 1, and +5% for each level increased.

54000543.name: Prosperity & Harmony
54000543.desc:
Prosperity in spirit, harmony in heart. 
Placing on site:
The capacity of the first Garage, Dock, Hangar is increased. +10 at Level 1, and +10 for each level increased.

54001035.name: Gravitic Wave Radar
54001035.desc:
Discover or be discovered!
Placing on site:
The capacity of the first Garage, Dock, Hangar is increased. +10 at Level 1, and +10 for each level increased.

57025087.name: Deluxe Queue Skin Choice Chest
57025087.desc: Open the chest to choose a permanent queue skin.

81000021.name: Resonator Lucky Chest
81000021.desc: Open it to get 2-30 Resonator Choice Chests.

260406001.name: Merchant Gifts Chest
260406001.desc: A chest obtained in the Auction House event. It contains a random reward.

localization.auction_102: Please visit the Titan Research Institute to view the Titan Gear you have won. Collect any unclaimed Revenue Coins or Auction Coins manually.
localization.auction_103: The purchased items have been delivered to your inventory or the Titan Gear storage. Collect any unclaimed Revenue Coins or Auction Coins manually.
localization.auction_108: Your Auction Coins will be temporarily held for automatic bidding.
localization.auction_109:
1.Bid: Bid once using my maximum bid.
2. Automatic Bidding: Bid once at the minimum increment, then automatically increase the bid if outbid. It ends when it reaches your top bid, the item is sold, or manually terminated.
localization.auction_110: You are the current highest bidder and cannot bid further. Would you like to set up automatic bidding?
localization.auction_112: Automatic Bidding: Bid once at the minimum increment, then automatically increase the bid if outbid. It ends when it reaches your top bid, the item is sold, or manually terminated.

localization.auction_127: Additional bidding: Your bid will automatically increase based on your set maximum bid when outbid. This ends when the new maximum bid is reached, the item is sold, or manually stopped.

localization.auction_2026_opt_079:
1. The Showroom will display items with an auction price exceeding {0} Auction Coins.
2. Once an item in the Showroom is successfully auctioned, the winning Commander will send a World Map Bonus Gift to the entire Warzone, which all Commanders can send a queue to claim.
localization.auction_2026_opt_080:
1. The Top 5 Commanders on the Auction Rankings for each period will unlock Mega Discount items for the entire Warzone during the subsequent Merchant Guild Gifts event.
2. Mega Discount items are available in limited quantities server-wide. This limit is shared across the Warzone; once exhausted, the item can no longer be purchased.
3. The server-wide limits for Mega Discount items will be replenished by the Merchant Convoy at 04:00, 10:00, 16:00, and 22:00 (Server Time) each period.
4. Purchasing Mega Discount items consumes Mega Discount Attempts. The Merchant Guild provides 1 free Attempt each period.
5. During the Merchant Guild event, Commanders can earn additional Mega Discount Attempts by successfully winning items in the auction. These bonus attempts bypass the server-wide purchase limit!
6. While en route, the Merchant Convoy will present trivia questions for all Commanders. Answer them correctly to win extra free rewards!
localization.auction_2026_opt_084: The Merchant Guild Gifts event begins: {0}
localization.auction_2026_opt_085: Titan Gears with an auction value exceeding {0} will be displayed here!
localization.auction_2026_opt_088:
1. The ranking tracks the total number of Auction Coins spent by Commanders during the auction event.
2. Tally Time: The current rankings will be tallied daily from 02:00 (Server Time) the day to 02:00 the following day.
localization.auction_2026_opt_089: Commanders spending over {0} Auction Coins in a single period are eligible for the ranking.
